evidenceSnippetOriginal: Do not require students to enter their own work into an unlicensed AI tool or use it in assignments. Unlicensed tools may be used optionally by students at the instructor's discretion but consider using a Penn-licensed tool for mandatory components of coursework to protect student data.
evidenceLocator: Publicly Available AI Tools > restrictions on unlicensed tools
